zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期弱势回调，关注支撑位反弹
zh.content:
当前艾达币价格处于0.16405附近，较24小时低点0.16197略有回升，但仍低于20日均线0.1675，显示多头力量偏弱。价格未能突破均线阻力，短期走势呈现震荡偏空特征，需要警惕进一步下探的可能性。

MACD指标为-0.00065，处于负值区域，暗示空头占优，但信号线未提供明确交叉提示，显示趋势尚未形成强烈反转。在缺乏RSI数据情况下，可结合价格与均线关系判断短期动能偏弱，市场可能出现盘整整理。

近期关键支撑位关注0.1615至0.1620区间，如跌破该水平，可能引发进一步回落至0.1590附近；阻力位则在20日均线0.1675及0.1700心理关口，突破后多头信号增强。建议投资者在支撑位附近可适度关注反弹机会，但控制仓位，避免追高。

综合来看，短线趋势偏弱震荡，交易策略以低吸高抛为主，宜等待价格企稳并突破均线确认多头趋势后，再考虑中长线布局。同时密切关注市场情绪及成交量变化，以降低风险并捕捉波段机会。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is showing a modest intraday recovery at 0.16405, but the broader structure still leans cautious. Price remains below the 20-period SMA at 0.1675, indicating that short-term momentum has not fully shifted back into bullish territory. The 1.25% daily gain suggests buyers are attempting stabilization after recent downside pressure, yet the inability to reclaim moving average territory keeps the market in a consolidation-to-soft-downtrend phase.

Momentum indicators reinforce the cautious tone, with MACD remaining slightly negative at -0.00065, suggesting that downside momentum is still present but losing intensity. The lack of a visible RSI reading limits overbought/oversold clarity, yet price behavior near recent lows implies accumulation rather than strong selling continuation. Overall, momentum appears to be stabilizing, though confirmation of reversal is not yet evident.

Support/resistance structure is defined by immediate support at 0.1619–0.1620, aligning with the session low, followed by psychological support at 0.1600. On the upside, the first resistance is the 20 SMA near 0.1675, with stronger resistance around 0.1700 where previous breakdown pressure likely sits. A sustained move above SMA would be required to shift bias toward recovery. Failure to hold support could reopen downside toward prior consolidation lows.

From a trading perspective, ADA/USD is better suited to range strategies while price remains below the 20 SMA. Short-term traders may consider buying near 0.162 support and taking profits toward 0.167–0.170 resistance, while maintaining tight risk controls. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 0.1675 before targeting higher continuation. Failure of support would favor short setups toward lower liquidity zones.
